page_content:
Recommended: TLPL776.

Credit Only Granted for: TLPL777 or TLPL788G.

Formerly: TLPL788G.

TLPL778 Scholarly Thought and Contemporary Curriculum (1-3 Credits) Current curricular trends, issues, theory, and research in the light of past curricular and social thought.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Human Development and Quantitative Methodology department.
